ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the country in the meat trade */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for meat trade */,
  "expected_revenue" INTEGER /* Expected revenue from the meat trade */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meat_types" (
  "meat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of meat */,
  "meat_name" TEXT /* Name of the meat type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meat type */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the meat type */,
  "production_method" TEXT /* Production method of the meat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade transaction */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sender country */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the receiver country */,
  "meat_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of meat */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the meat traded in kilograms */,
  "meat_price" REAL /* Price of the meat per kilogram */,
  "toxicity" REAL /* Toxicity level of the meat */,
  "day_number" INTEGER /* Day number of the trade */,
  "trade_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the trade */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade transaction */,
  "shipped_from" TEXT /* Port or location where the meat was shipped from */,
  "shipped_to" TEXT /* Port or location where the meat was shipped to */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation used for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_meat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("meat_type_id") REFERENCES meat_types ("meat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade discount */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount applied */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_discounts_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of financial metric */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date for which the financial metric is applicable */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the financial metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toxicity_levels" (
  "toxicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each toxicity level */,
  "meat_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meat type */,
  "toxicity_value" REAL /* Toxicity value of the meat type */,
  "toxicity_category" TEXT /* Category of toxicity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("toxicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toxicity_levels_meat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("meat_type_id") REFERENCES meat_types ("meat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade volume */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade transaction */,
  "volume_value" REAL /* Volume of the meat traded in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_volumes_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
